intro.en: Hey there! 👋 I'm **Sheetal**, a full-stack developer who loves building beautiful, performant digital experiences. I specialize in modern web technologies and creating products that users actually enjoy using.
intro.hi: नमस्ते! 👋 मैं **शीतल** हूँ, एक फुल-स्टैक डेवलपर जो सुंदर और उच्च प्रदर्शन वाली डिजिटल अनुभव बनाने से प्यार करती है। मैं आधुनिक वेब तकनीकों में विशेषज्ञता रखती हूँ।
intro.te: నమస్తే! 👋 నేను **శీతల్**, అందమైన మరియు అధిక పనితీరు గల డిజిటల్ అనుభవాలను రూపొందించడానికి ఇష్టపడే ఫుల్-స్టాక్ డెవలపర్.
intro.es: ¡Hola! 👋 Soy **Sheetal**, una desarrolladora full-stack apasionada por crear experiencias digitales hermosas y de alto rendimiento.
intro.fr: Salut ! 👋 Je suis **Sheetal**, une développeuse full-stack passionnée par la création d'expériences numériques belles et performantes.
intro.de: Hallo! 👋 Ich bin **Sheetal**, eine Full-Stack-Entwicklerin, die es liebt, schöne, leistungsstarke digitale Erlebnisse zu schaffen.
intro.ja: こんにちは！👋 私は**Sheetal**です。美しくハイパフォーマンスなデジタル体験を構築するのが大好きなフルスタック開発者です。

skills.en:
Here's what I work with daily:

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
**Backend:** Node.js, Python, Express, FastAPI
**Database:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
**DevOps:** Docker, AWS, Vercel, CI/CD
**Tools:** Git, Figma, VS Code

experience.en:
I've been building for the web for over **3+ years**, working across startups and freelancing.

🏢 Worked on enterprise SaaS platforms
🚀 Shipped multiple production apps
💡 Built AI-powered tools and dashboards
🌍 Collaborated with teams globally

🏢 एंटरप्राइज SaaS प्लेटफॉर्म पर काम किया
🚀 कई प्रोडक्शन ऐप्स शिप किए
💡 AI-पावर्ड टूल्स बनाए

🏢 ఎంటర్‌ప్రైజ్ SaaS ప్లాట్‌ఫారమ్‌లపై పనిచేశాను
🚀 బహుళ ప్రొడక్షన్ యాప్‌లను షిప్ చేశాను

projects.en:
Here are some highlights:

🎵 **Music Streaming App** — Full-stack music player with offline support
📊 **Analytics Dashboard** — Real-time data visualization platform
🤖 **AI Document Processor** — Intelligent document extraction tool
🌐 **E-commerce Platform** — Modern shopping experience with payments

Check out the [Work](/work) page for more!

hire.en:
Great question! Here's why:

✅ **End-to-end delivery** — From design to deployment
✅ **Modern stack** — Latest technologies, best practices
✅ **Quality obsessed** — Pixel-perfect, performant code
✅ **Strong communicator** — Clear, timely updates
✅ **Fast learner** — Adapt to any tech stack quickly

Ready to start? Visit the [Hire Me](/hire-me) page!
hire.hi:

fun.en:
Some fun facts about me:

🎮 I debug better with lo-fi music playing
☕ Powered by an unhealthy amount of chai
🌙 Night owl — my best code happens after midnight
📚 Currently reading about system design & AI
🎯 Goal: Build products that make people smile
fun.hi:
कुछ मजेदार तथ्य:

🎮 Lo-fi म्यूजिक के साथ बेहतर डिबग करती हूं
☕ चाय से चलती हूं
🌙 रात की उल्लू — बेस्ट कोड आधी रात के बाद
fun.te:
కొన్ని ఆసక్తికరమైన విషయాలు:

🎮 Lo-fi మ్యూజిక్‌తో బెటర్ డీబగ్ చేస్తాను
☕ చాయ్‌తో నడుస్తాను
🌙 నైట్ ఔల్

🎮 Debuggo mejor con música lo-fi

🌙 Ave nocturna
